text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
118 
GAP_MO_COINS_3M 
LABEL: 
Gap Coinsurance Standard Mail Order — Three-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a three-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
—
